ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* Type of the event (e.g., Meeting, Workshop) */,
  "location" INTEGER /* Location of the event */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program associated with the event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the participant is enrolled in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the participant record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the participant attended */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant attending the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Participant's feedback on the event */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant checked out */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the attendance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the program */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the program is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member within the organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the staff member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the staff member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the staff member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staff record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the staff record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the staff member is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event for which feedback is given */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Coordinator, Volunteer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of participants at the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location record */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the location is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., Meeting, Workshop) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)
